a.label: Channel barycentric coordinates R_c, R_s, R_int
a.standard_term: normalized (barycentric-style) ratios of channel curvatures to total curvature

b.label: Self/coupling Hessian split H = H_c + H_s
b.standard_term: diagonal-plus-hollow (diagonal / zero-diagonal) matrix decomposition of the Hessian

evidence.label: Coupling-confinement
evidence.summary: **Coupling-confinement:** If rank(H_c) = r_c, then e_k(Ŝ_c) = 0 identically for all k > r_c.

evidence.label: Self-confinement
evidence.summary: **Self-confinement:** If rank(H_s) = r_s, then e_k(Ŝ_s) = 0 identically for all k > r_s.
